overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark cyberpunk industrial facility in a video game. The player moves from narrow graffiti-lit corridors through a room with a large holographic projection into a vast multi-level neon-lit atrium with Asian-inspired signage and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with glowing graffiti

events.description: passing large glowing hand graffiti on right wall
approaching brighter grated window at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark narrow corridor, observing the glowing graffiti and industrial details on the walls

entered.detail: rough concrete walls forming a narrow passage
large cyan graffiti of a hand with stylized text glowing on the wall
horizontal metal slats set into the concrete wall
recessed doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a dark, narrow concrete corridor illuminated only by cyan glowing graffiti. The walls are rough industrial concrete with metal ventilation grilles. The player approaches a grated window at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with large holographic projection

events.description: climbing through grated window into room with large holographic figure
approaching plastic strip curtain doorway leading to brighter area

agents.ego_description: walking around the holographic display and heading toward the exit curtains at the far end of the room

entered.detail: large cyan holographic projection of a hooded figure with crossed arms
large rectangular concrete blocks scattered on the floor
translucent plastic strips hanging in a doorway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a medium-sized room through a window opening, revealing a striking holographic projection of a hooded figure. The room contains concrete blocks and industrial elements. The player moves toward a plastic strip curtain doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level cyberpunk atrium with neon signage and walkways

events.description: passing through plastic curtains into large neon-lit industrial atrium
turning left to explore upper walkway area with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through the expansive cyberpunk interior, examining multi-level metal walkways and glowing neon structures

entered.detail: tall cylindrical pillars emitting bright cyan light
tall red illuminated signs with Asian characters
grated metal catwalks and stairs connecting multiple levels
large industrial equipment and ventilation units
network of large pipes and conduits on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a vast multi-level atrium filled with atmospheric fog, the scene reveals a cyberpunk industrial space with towering cyan neon pillars, red vertical signage with Asian characters, and complex metal walkways. The player explores the area, turning to examine the intricate industrial architecture and lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk atrium. It begins by moving through a dark, narrow concrete passage illuminated by cyan glowing graffiti and metal ventilation grilles, heading toward a grated window. As the camera passes through this opening, the space expands into a medium-sized room dominated by a striking holographic projection of a hooded figure among concrete blocks. The scene then shifts as the camera pushes through a plastic strip curtain, emerging from the enclosure into a vast multi-level atrium filled with atmospheric fog. Finally, the view opens up to reveal towering cyan neon pillars and red vertical signage with Asian characters, turning to examine the complex metal walkways and intricate industrial architecture.
